name: CES 2026
description: The world's largest consumer technology trade show. Major venue for XR headset reveals, AR glasses, spatial computing hardware, and immersive display innovations.

name: SPIE AR/VR/MR 2026
description: Exhibition and conference focused on optics and photonics for augmented, virtual, and mixed reality. Part of SPIE Photonics West, covering displays, waveguides, sensors, and optical components for XR hardware.

name: MWC Barcelona 2026
description: Mobile World Congress showcasing XR devices, 5G-powered immersive experiences, AR smart glasses, and enterprise spatial computing from global telcos and tech companies.

name: SXSW 2026
description: South by Southwest festival spanning tech, film, and music. Features dedicated XR showcases, immersive installations, and spatial computing panels alongside emerging technology programming.

name: GDC 2026
description: The Game Developers Conference, the largest professional game industry event with dedicated XR development tracks, VR game showcases, and immersive technology sessions across five days.

name: NVIDIA GTC 2026
description: NVIDIA's GPU Technology Conference covering AI, spatial computing, real-time ray tracing, and the rendering technologies powering next-gen VR and AR experiences.

name: IEEE VR 2026
description: The 33rd IEEE Conference on Virtual Reality and 3D User Interfaces. The premier academic VR research conference, hosted in Korea for the first time.

name: VR Games Showcase (Spring 2026)
description: Direct-style digital showcase dedicated to VR game reveals, trailers, and announcements.

name: Laval Virtual 2026
description: One of Europe's most important XR events, now in its 28th edition. Covers VR, AR, and MR through exhibitions, conferences, awards, and networking across the full immersive technology industry.

name: ACM CHI 2026
description: The leading international conference on Human-Computer Interaction, featuring cutting-edge research on spatial interfaces, XR interaction design, and immersive computing.

name: Google I/O 2026
description: Google's annual developer conference. Expected to feature Android XR announcements, ARCore updates, and spatial computing platform news. Dates are tentative.

name: Meaningful XR 2026
description: Conference exploring the transformative potential of VR, AR, and MR across education, research, and industry.

name: Computex 2026
description: Asia's largest ICT trade show, showcasing VR/AR hardware, chipsets, displays, and next-gen computing platforms from global manufacturers.

name: Summer Game Fest 2026
description: Major gaming showcase hosted by Geoff Keighley with announcements and trailers from publishers and studios across all platforms, including VR titles.

name: Apple WWDC 2026
description: Apple's annual developer conference. Expected updates to visionOS, Vision Pro, and spatial computing frameworks.

name: AWE USA 2026
description: The world's largest AR and VR conference and expo. Enterprise XR, spatial computing, AI, and immersive tech across multiple tracks.

name: Immersive Tech Week 2026
description: Europe's leading immersive technology event covering VR, AR, MR, and spatial computing across multiple venues.

name: SIGGRAPH 2026
description: The premier conference on computer graphics, interactive techniques, and immersive experiences. Major XR research and demos.

name: Games for Change Festival 2026
description: Festival exploring the intersection of games, XR, and social impact. Includes VR showcases and immersive experiences.

name: Gamescom 2026
description: Europe's largest gaming trade fair with over 300,000 attendees. Features VR game demos, hardware showcases, developer presentations, and Opening Night Live.

name: IFA 2026
description: The world's largest consumer electronics trade show, featuring AR/VR headsets, smart glasses, wearable technology, and immersive display innovations.

name: Tokyo Game Show 2026
description: Japan's premier gaming expo showcasing the latest VR games, PSVR2 titles, and immersive experiences from Japanese and global studios.

name: Meta Connect 2026
description: Meta's annual VR and AR showcase. Quest updates, Reality Labs announcements, and developer sessions.

name: ISMAR 2026
description: IEEE International Symposium on Mixed and Augmented Reality. The top academic conference for AR and MR research.

name: Augmented Enterprise Summit 2026
description: Enterprise-focused event covering AI, XR, and digital twins. Real-world case studies, workshops, and hands-on demos.

name: Web Summit 2026
description: The world's largest technology conference with tracks covering XR, spatial computing, AI, and immersive startups alongside 70,000+ attendees.

name: AWE Asia 2026
description: Asia-Pacific edition of the Augmented World Expo, covering enterprise XR, spatial computing, and immersive technology across the APAC market. Dates are tentative.

name: UnitedXR Europe 2026
description: European XR industry event bringing together developers, creators, and enterprise adopters.

name: CES 2027
description: The world's largest consumer technology trade show returns. Always a marquee event for XR hardware reveals, AR glasses announcements, and immersive display technology.

name: SPIE Photonics West 2027
description: Premier photonics and optics conference and exhibition. Includes the AR/VR/MR expo covering waveguides, micro-displays, sensors, and optical components for next-gen headsets. Dates are tentative.
